figures.caption: Fig. 2. Top ten class-level gene signatures derived from mean attribution scores on the mRNA branch for each grade.

Fig. 3. Qualitative comparison of WSI attribution between SG-Fusion and GLORIA across glioma grades. Rows correspond to grade II, III and IV. GLORIA produces more spatially coherent attributions concentrated on tumor-relevant regions, while SG-Fusion yields a sparse and diffuse, and thus less interpretable, response.
